## Environment
- Browser / Device:
- Role yang login: (Direktur Utama / Wakil / C-Level / GM / Manager / Lead / Staff)
- Modul: (Auth / Payroll / Project / dst)
- Versi commit: `git rev-parse --short HEAD`

## Severity
- [ ] Critical — block production, data corruption
- [ ] High — fitur utama broken
- [ ] Medium — fitur sekunder broken
- [ ] Low — UX issue, kosmetik
